text:
```json
[
  "Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with AI focus at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90), completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00), held leadership roles including Head of contest protocol at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society, and can be reached at tanshanchien@gmail.com or +6016-793-6308",
  "Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly with frameworks experience including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph; currently works at Mindhive developing RAG pipelines, YOLOv12 for PDF processing, and ByeDB, and previously developed AutoDocX, a GUI automation tool saving three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI converter, and a 3D space shooter game in C++",
  "Tan Shan Chien won Champion at Godamlah 2026, CodeFest 2025, Codenection 2025, Physics Hackathon 2025, and Programming League National 2025, placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025, and was Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023"
]
```
json_data: Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with AI focus at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90), completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00), held leadership roles including Head of contest protocol at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society, and can be reached at tanshanchien@gmail.com or +6016-793-6308

Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly with frameworks experience including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph; currently works at Mindhive developing RAG pipelines, YOLOv12 for PDF processing, and ByeDB, and previously developed AutoDocX, a GUI automation tool saving three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI converter, and a 3D space shooter game in C++

Tan Shan Chien won Champion at Godamlah 2026, CodeFest 2025, Codenection 2025, Physics Hackathon 2025, and Programming League National 2025, placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025, and was Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023
